# prjct-cli — Project Context
<!-- Generated by prjct — https://prjct.app -->

## Tech Stack
- Languages: TypeScript
- Frameworks: Hono

## Commands

| Action | Command |
|--------|---------|
| Install | `npm install` |
| Dev | `npm run dev` |
| Test | `npm test` |
| Build | `npm run build` |

> Run `p. sync` to populate project intelligence

## prjct Workflow

Run `prjct` CLI commands for project management:
- `prjct sync` — Analyze project, regenerate context
- `prjct task "desc"` — Start a task
- `prjct done` — Complete current subtask
- `prjct ship "name"` — Ship feature with PR
